title: NANA CARES Act Funding Information
summary: NANA is pleased to provide the NANA Individual Disaster Relief Program for shareholders who have been negatively impacted by the COVID-19 public emergency. title: Alaska Senior Residents eligible for card in order to hunt, sport fish, or trap for free
summary: Alaska residents who are 60 years of age or older and meet the Department of Fish and Game’s residency definition are eligible for a senior identification card in order to hunt, sport fish, or trap for free.
